subcodes.first_line: O thou who wanderest in the divine path, be thou lost and bewildered in this boundless desert [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته کوی الهی در این بیابان بی پایان سرگشته و سرگردان شو و در این سرمنزل
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant, @living waters; water of life
